payload.answer: I can’t safely generate a durable-memory repair option from the provided invalid or unsafe prior output. Please provide the original user statement and any relevant existing memory facts to evaluate.
repair_options: Escalate to a stronger model with the original user statement and relevant existing memory context.
Reject the unsafe/invalid proposal and ask the user to restate what they want remembered.
Do nothing until valid source content is available for review.
